subject_profile.summary: Base country-level assessment; default category weights prioritize rule of law, institutional integrity, and personal freedom.
stated_values: Rule of law and institutional integrity weighted most heavily
Personal freedom and security from arbitrary state action are foundational
Economic success is contingent on rule of law, not a substitute for it

flags: Generated 2026-05-28 under v2.0: rebuilt entirely from independent sources (Bank of Korea/South-Korean estimates, UN Panel of Experts, V-Dem, RSF, Freedom House, HRW, 38 North, NK News, DailyNK, defector testimony); ALL DPRK state media/official statistics EXCLUDED as propaganda.

Data limitation (severe): reliable internal data is largely absent - every economic/demographic figure is external estimation, so confidence is capped low throughout. The state-set won rate was used only to characterize the official/black-market gap, never as a real value.

Standout drags: a totalitarian dictatorship with among the world's worst rights and press, a collapsed command/sanctioned economy, a nuclear-pariah posture now supplying Russia's war, and chronic food insecurity. Overall: among the most negative profiles.

economic.notes: A collapsed, sanctioned command economy with a state-set currency and recurrent food insecurity.

fiscal_state.notes: An opaque command economy; external estimates show a small, sanction-shrunk GDP with recurrent food insecurity. (Bank of Korea estimates)

monetary_independence.notes: A state-set won with no real central-bank function, a wide official/black-market gap, and partial dollarization. (38 North; DailyNK)

inflation.notes: Estimated only - volatile and FX-shortage-driven. (DailyNK trackers)

banking_stability.notes: No real banking system; SWIFT-cut, sanctioned, and illicit-finance-dependent. (UN Panel of Experts)

trade_actions_capacity.notes: Heavily sanctioned and China-dependent, with illicit revenue (cyber-theft, coal, arms) and munitions supplied to Russia in 2024-25. (UN PoE; 38 North)

institutional.notes: A totalitarian dictatorship with no rule of law, no usable data, and the world's worst press repression.

rule_of_law.notes: A totalitarian dynastic dictatorship with no judicial independence. (V-Dem; Freedom House)

statistical_integrity.notes: No usable official data; everything is external estimation. (insufficient data)

civil_service_capacity.notes: A capable coercive/military-nuclear apparatus, but a hollow civilian capacity. (independent analysis)

press_freedom.notes: The world's worst, dead last on the RSF index. (RSF)

political_social.notes: A consolidated totalitarian state with among the world's worst rights and chronic food insecurity.

political_stability.notes: A consolidated dynastic regime - suppressed stability - with an opaque succession/collapse fat-tail. (38 North; NK News)

civil_liberties.notes: Political-prison camps and total social control - among the world's worst. (HRW; UN Commission of Inquiry)

treatment_non_citizens.notes: Closed, with no residency pathway - a state people flee. (defector testimony)

social_cohesion.notes: A songbun caste system, famine history, and atomized control. (HRW)

demographics.notes: Young-ish but malnutrition-stunted, with opaque data. (UN/FAO nutrition estimates)

geopolitical.notes: An isolated nuclear pariah, now a co-combatant supplier to Russia, under the heaviest sanctions.

alliance_reliability.notes: Isolated and China-dependent, with a deepening Russia mutual-defence pact and troops sent to Ukraine in 2024-25. (38 North; NK News)

conflict_involvement.notes: A nuclear-armed pariah in perpetual peninsula tension, now a co-combatant supplier to Russia. (UN PoE)

sanctions_capital_controls.notes: Among the most-sanctioned states on earth, with total capital controls. (UNSC; OFAC)

physical_practical.notes: A collapsed health system and decrepit, electricity-starved infrastructure, with chronic food insecurity.

climate.notes: Flood/drought, deforestation, and chronic food insecurity/famine risk. (FAO/WFP estimates)

healthcare.notes: Collapsed, with a heavy TB/malnutrition burden - among the world's worst. (WHO/independent)

infrastructure.notes: Decrepit and electricity-starved (visible in nighttime-satellite darkness). (38 North)

crime_safety.notes: State-imposed 'order' but high state-violence risk - a negative duality. (HRW)

summary: A totalitarian dynastic dictatorship with among the world's worst rights record - political-prison camps, total social control, and dead-last press freedom - and a collapsed, sanctioned command economy with a state-set currency, no real banking system, and chronic food insecurity. Internationally it is a nuclear-armed pariah under the heaviest sanctions, now supplying munitions and troops to Russia's war. Healthcare and infrastructure are collapsed and electricity-starved. All figures are external estimates with no usable internal data; the profile sits among the most negative in the dataset.
